login.title: Welcome
login.subtitle: Sign in with your 42 intra account to discover students.
login.privacy_note: Authentication is handled securely by intra.42.fr via OAuth2.

home.logout_confirm_body: You will need to sign in again.

errors.network: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
errors.timeout: Request timed out. The 42 API is slow or unreachable.
errors.unauthorized: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
errors.rate_limited: Too many requests. Please wait a moment.
errors.server: The 42 API is currently unavailable. Please try again later.
errors.login_failed: Sign in failed. Please try again.
errors.empty_login: Please enter a login to search.
errors.invalid_login: Invalid login format (only letters, digits, - and _).
